meta.name: RealEstate AI Design System
meta.aesthetic_direction: Universal khaki tones with deep navy for authority. A warm, grounded design that inspires trust and reliability. Focus on clear data visualization and intuitive workflows with a premium, approachable feel.

layout.hero_style: Immersive image with clear value proposition
layout.card_style: Rounded corners, subtle shadow, clean typography

page_inventory.name: HomePage
page_inventory.purpose: Primary landing page showcasing the AI-powered property management platform with a compelling hero section, feature highlights, social proof, and clear conversion paths.
page_inventory.layout: Hero with AI property valuation demo at top, followed by feature highlights grid, testimonials carousel, and pricing preview section.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Primary entry point — convert visitors into free trial signups through AI demo engagement and social proof.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Hero headline emphasizing AI property management, interactive valuation demo, 3+ testimonials from property managers, feature benefit descriptions, pricing tier summary.

page_inventory.name: PropertiesBrowsePage
page_inventory.purpose: Allow users to browse, search, and filter property listings with integrated map view and AI-powered recommendations.
page_inventory.layout: Split view with filter sidebar on left, property card grid in center, and toggleable map view on right.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Engage prospective tenants and buyers — drive inquiries and applications through property discovery.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property cards with images, price, location, key features. Filter options for price, bedrooms, location, property type. Map with property markers.

page_inventory.name: PropertyDetailsPage
page_inventory.purpose: Provide comprehensive property information including gallery, virtual tour, AI market insights, and direct contact options.
page_inventory.layout: Full-width image gallery at top, property details and AI insights in two-column layout below, contact form sidebar, similar properties at bottom.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Convert property interest into direct inquiries or applications through detailed information and AI-powered insights.
page_inventory.content_requirements: High-quality property images, detailed descriptions, amenity lists, neighborhood data, AI valuation estimate, virtual tour embed, agent contact info.

page_inventory.name: PricingPage
page_inventory.purpose: Present transparent pricing tiers with feature comparison to convert evaluators into paying customers.
page_inventory.layout: Centered pricing cards in a 4-column row, feature comparison table below, FAQ accordion, and enterprise contact section.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Convert evaluators into trial signups by clearly communicating value at each tier.
page_inventory.content_requirements: 4 pricing tiers: Starter ($49/mo) for individual landlords, Professional ($149/mo) for growing portfolios, Business ($399/mo) for property management companies, Enterprise (custom pricing) for large organizations. Each tier lists included features, unit limits, and support level. Feature comparison matrix covering all 22 platform features.

page_inventory.name: AboutPage
page_inventory.purpose: Build credibility and trust by sharing the company mission, team, and values.
page_inventory.layout: Mission statement hero, team grid, company values section, and contact information.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Build trust and credibility — reassure prospects that the platform is backed by a competent, mission-driven team.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Mission statement, team member photos and bios, company values, office location, founding story.

page_inventory.name: ContactPage
page_inventory.purpose: Provide direct communication channels for support, sales, and partnership inquiries.
page_inventory.layout: Split layout with contact form on left and contact information with office map on right.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Capture leads from prospects who need more information before committing — route to sales or support.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Contact form with name, email, subject, message fields. Phone number, email address, office address. Google Maps embed. Links to FAQ and help center.

page_inventory.name: DashboardPage
page_inventory.purpose: Central command center providing AI-powered portfolio overview with key metrics, actionable insights, and quick actions.
page_inventory.layout: Widget-based grid with AI insights panel spanning full width at top, key metrics row below, and two-column layout for charts and activity feed.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Retain users by demonstrating ongoing AI value — surface actionable insights that save time and money.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Key metrics: total units, occupancy rate, monthly revenue, pending maintenance. AI insights with confidence scores. Recent activity timeline. Quick action buttons for common tasks.

page_inventory.name: AdminPage
page_inventory.purpose: System administration interface for user management, platform settings, and operational analytics.
page_inventory.layout: Tabbed interface with user management table, system settings panels, and analytics dashboard.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Enable platform administrators to manage users and settings efficiently — reduce support overhead.
page_inventory.content_requirements: User list with roles and status, permission management interface, system health indicators, audit log with filters, billing and subscription management.

page_inventory.name: AIPropertyManagementPage
page_inventory.purpose: SEO landing page targeting AI property management queries — showcase predictive intelligence and automation capabilities.
page_inventory.layout: Long-form landing page with AI showcase hero, feature demo sections, use case cards, ROI metrics, and trial CTA.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Capture organic search traffic for AI property management keywords and convert into trial signups.
page_inventory.content_requirements: AI feature demonstrations, predictive maintenance examples, rent optimization case studies, ROI statistics, comparison with traditional management.

page_inventory.name: AutomateManagementPage
page_inventory.purpose: SEO landing page for property management automation queries — highlight time savings and workflow automation.
page_inventory.layout: Long-form landing page with time savings hero, workflow automation diagrams, before/after metrics, and demo request CTA.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Capture organic search traffic for automation keywords and convert into demo requests or trial signups.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Time savings statistics, workflow automation examples, before/after comparisons, customer case study, automation feature list.

page_inventory.name: TenantPortalPage
page_inventory.purpose: Self-service portal for tenants to view lease details, payment history, and submit maintenance requests.
page_inventory.layout: Dashboard-style layout with lease summary card at top, payment history table, and maintenance request section.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Improve tenant satisfaction and retention by providing convenient self-service access to lease and payment information.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Current lease details, payment history with receipts, maintenance request form and status tracking, important documents, landlord contact information.

page_inventory.name: LandlordPortalPage
page_inventory.purpose: Comprehensive landlord view for property overview, tenant management, and financial reporting.
page_inventory.layout: Multi-section dashboard with property overview cards, tenant management table, and financial report widgets.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Demonstrate platform value to landlords through comprehensive portfolio management and AI-driven insights.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property portfolio summary, tenant list with status, income/expense reports, vacancy rates, maintenance status, AI optimization suggestions.

page_inventory.name: DeveloperPortalPage
page_inventory.purpose: Portal for property developers to manage new development listings, project tools, and marketing materials.
page_inventory.layout: Project-centric layout with development listings grid, project management tools, and marketing asset section.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Attract property developers to the platform by providing specialized tools for new development marketing and sales.
page_inventory.content_requirements: New development project listings, project timeline tools, marketing material templates, sales progress dashboards, buyer inquiry management.

page_inventory.name: MaintenanceRequestPage
page_inventory.purpose: Interface for submitting maintenance requests, viewing request status, and communicating with vendors.
page_inventory.layout: Form-centric layout with request submission form, active request status cards, and vendor communication panel.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Streamline maintenance workflows to improve tenant satisfaction and reduce response times.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Request submission form with issue categories, photo upload, priority selection. Status tracking with timeline. Vendor assignment and communication thread.

page_inventory.name: LeaseManagementPage
page_inventory.purpose: Comprehensive lease management for creating, viewing, signing, and tracking lease agreements.
page_inventory.layout: List-detail layout with lease cards on left and detail view on right, plus lease creation wizard.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Digitize and streamline the lease lifecycle to reduce administrative overhead and improve compliance.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Lease templates, digital signature integration, renewal reminders, expiration tracking, lease term details, tenant and property association.

page_inventory.name: PaymentCollectionPage
page_inventory.purpose: Payment management interface for viewing payment history, setting up automated payments, and managing payment methods.
page_inventory.layout: Dashboard-style layout with payment summary cards at top, payment history table, and payment method management section.
page_inventory.conversion_role: Simplify rent collection to improve cash flow and reduce late payments through automation.
page_inventory.content_requirements: Payment history with status indicators, automated payment scheduling, multiple payment method support, invoice generation, late payment notifications and fee tracking.

feature_specs.description: Browse, search, and filter property listings with map integration and detailed property views.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Card grid with filter sidebar, Google Maps integration, and infinite scroll.

feature_specs.description: AI-powered tenant evaluation with credit, income, rental history, and background checks consolidated into a risk score.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Split view with application list and detail panel, AI score gauge with breakdown bars.

feature_specs.description: Digital lease creation, signing, renewal tracking, and expiration alerts.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Card-based lease list with status indicators, detail view with document viewer, renewal recommendation banner.

feature_specs.description: Online payment processing with automatic reminders, late fee calculation, and payment status tracking.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Progress bar for collection rate, payment status table with badges, automated reminder timeline.

feature_specs.description: Submit, track, and manage maintenance requests with photo uploads, priority routing, and vendor communication.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Form-centric layout with request cards, status timeline, and vendor communication panel.

feature_specs.description: Automated P&L statements, cash flow analysis, and tax-ready financial reports with AI anomaly detection.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Report dashboard with chart widgets, date range selector, export buttons, and AI anomaly callouts.

feature_specs.description: Centralized messaging system for tenant-landlord communication with notification management.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Inbox-style layout with conversation list and message detail panel, AI-suggested reply chips.

feature_specs.description: Centralized document storage for leases, inspection reports, receipts, and compliance documents.
feature_specs.ui_approach: File-browser layout with folder hierarchy, document preview panel, and drag-and-drop upload.

feature_specs.description: Fully responsive mobile experience with touch-optimized interfaces for on-the-go property management.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Responsive layouts, tab bar navigation, touch-friendly controls, minimum 44px touch targets.

feature_specs.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard with customizable reports, data visualization, and trend analysis.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Widget-based analytics dashboard with interactive charts, date filters, and export functionality.

feature_specs.description: AI analyzes maintenance history, property age, and seasonal patterns to predict issues before they become costly repairs.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Timeline view with prediction cards showing probability, estimated cost, and recommended actions.

feature_specs.description: Intelligent scheduling for inspections, maintenance, and viewings with calendar integration and route optimization.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Multi-view calendar with drag-and-drop, color-coded events, and AI route suggestions.

feature_specs.description: Integrated Google Maps for property location display, neighborhood data, and location-based search.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Embedded map with property markers, clustering, and neighborhood overlay data.

feature_specs.description: Clean, modern interface with consistent design patterns, smooth animations, and intuitive navigation.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Design system-driven components with consistent spacing, typography, and interaction patterns.

feature_specs.description: AI-powered property valuation using comparable sales, market trends, and neighborhood data.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Valuation card with confidence range, comparable properties list, and market trend charts.

feature_specs.description: Configurable workflow automation for approvals, notifications, and task management.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Visual workflow builder with drag-and-drop steps, condition logic, and trigger configuration.

feature_specs.description: Self-service tenant portal for lease access, payment management, and maintenance requests.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Tenant-focused dashboard with quick actions, lease summary, and communication center.

feature_specs.description: AI-powered property recommendations based on user preferences, search history, and market data.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Recommendation carousel with match scores, personalized property cards, and preference tuning.

feature_specs.description: AI-powered chatbot for instant answers to tenant and landlord questions, available across all pages.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Floating chat widget with expandable conversation panel, quick reply suggestions, and handoff to human support.

feature_specs.description: Market-aware rent pricing suggestions using comparable properties, vacancy rates, and seasonal demand.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Pricing analysis card with current vs. suggested rent, sparkline chart, and one-click apply.

feature_specs.description: Advanced AI tenant screening with comprehensive risk scoring, background checks, and predictive analytics.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Multi-factor risk assessment dashboard with score breakdown, document verification, and approval workflow.

feature_specs.description: Dedicated backend infrastructure for data processing, AI model serving, API management, and system reliability.
feature_specs.ui_approach: N/A — backend service. Admin monitoring through system health dashboard.

ctas: See AI in Action on Your Properties
Calculate Your Savings with AI Management
taglines: Your AI Property Manager — Never Miss a Beat
Manage Smarter, Not Harder — AI Does the Heavy Lifting
value_proposition: AI that actively manages your properties — predicting maintenance issues, optimizing rent prices, screening tenants, and reducing vacancy — so you manage more units with less effort.
seo_keywords: best property management software for landlords

mobile_design.app_icon_description: A stylized house icon with a subtle AI brain symbol integrated, using the primary and secondary colors. The style should be clean and modern, reflecting trust and innovation.
mobile_design.splash_screen_description: The app logo centered on a background using the primary color. A subtle animation of the AI brain symbol could pulse gently.

mobile_asset_prompts.app-icon: A 1024x1024 app icon featuring a stylized house with an integrated AI brain symbol. Use primary color #2C3E50 and secondary color #8B7355. Clean, modern, flat design with subtle gradients. The house shape is geometric and minimal, with the AI brain element woven into the roofline. White background with rounded corners per iOS/Android guidelines.
mobile_asset_prompts.splash-screen: A splash screen with the app logo centered on a solid #2C3E50 primary color background. The logo is white and features the house-AI brain mark. Below the logo, the text 'RealEstate AI' in Instrument Serif 700 weight, white color. Subtle radial glow behind the logo suggesting intelligence and warmth.
mobile_asset_prompts.store-screenshot-1: A mobile app screenshot showing the dashboard view with key metrics cards (occupancy rate, monthly revenue, pending maintenance), an AI insights panel with actionable recommendations, and a clean tab bar navigation at the bottom. Uses the Warm & Trustworthy color palette with #2C3E50 primary and #FAF6F1 background. Instrument Serif headings and DM Sans body text. Modern, professional, data-rich but not cluttered.

asset_prompts.hero_image: A wide, cinematic photograph of a modern residential property complex at golden hour. Clean architectural lines, lush landscaping, and warm natural lighting. Overlay a subtle, semi-transparent data visualization layer showing AI analytics — occupancy rates, rent trends, and maintenance predictions — floating elegantly over the building. The mood is professional, calm, and forward-thinking. Color palette aligns with #2C3E50 primary and #8B7355 secondary tones. Aspect ratio 16:9, high resolution.
asset_prompts.logo: A modern, minimal logo for 'RealEstate AI'. The mark combines a geometric house silhouette with an abstract AI brain/circuit motif integrated into the structure. Primary color #2C3E50 with accent #8B7355. The wordmark uses Instrument Serif 700 weight. The design conveys trust, intelligence, and professionalism. Works at all sizes from favicon to billboard. Clean lines, no gradients in the mark, suitable for single-color reproduction.
